violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employees noted preparing food and cooking food after contaminating hands by handling raw eggs dirty rags wiping cloths personal items (phones) and other dirty equipment without washing hands or changing gloves between each step to prevent cross contamination.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided and/or not working at the hand washing stations in back prep area and bar.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in throughout the kitchen.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in freezer and cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interiors of coolers/freezers exteriors of reachin coolers/freezers under grills metal shelves and other equipmetn exteriors noted need cleaning
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler interior door between dish washing area and cooking area noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in areas subject to moisture under and around in place equipment and ceiling tiles around vents noted in need of cleaning.

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employees noted using cell phones not changing gloves between handling non food contact items and food and returning to work without washing hands and without washing hands before putting on gloves.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food prep area towels out.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical bottles noted not labeled in areas subject to moisture.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Onions noted being stored on the floor in food prep area under prep table.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep areas.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters above grill and fryers noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in areas subject to moisture and under and around in place equipmetn noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interiors of coolers/freezers exteriors of reachin coolers/freezers under grill and exteriors of equipment ashelves noted need cleaning
